title: clematis douglasii var. bigelovii
intro: Clematis douglasii var. bigelovii is a flowering plant species within the Clematis genus, known for its fragrant, white to pale yellow flowers that bloom in late spring and early summer. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
